title: Mohabbat ka donon ke dil par asar
Ek do teen aaja mausam hai rangeen
Kasoor aap ka huzoor aap ka
O pardesia pyar ki bahar leke
O sar se chunaria rama hoye
Shabe gham subah ho gayi rote rote
Mere dil men aaiye meri nazar men
Dil ko beemari tere pyar ki
So rahe hain bekhabar sone wale
Mere sar se sarak gayi chunari
Gora rang na kisi par aaye
Pehle unke saamne jate hi khanjar
Taqdeer ne chiragh e tamanna bujha diya
Mere dil ki chowki par rangeele
Kaun aaya ban ke mere jevan ka meet
Main to odh chunariya aayi hoon
Aa gaye dil men tum mere
Phoolon ka haar mere man ka singaar
Chal chal chal nasar teri kahan hai
Meri jaan mohabbat karo chupke chupke
Mast nazaron se kisi ko muskurana
Dono pe mohabbat ka ho asar
Rajaji ke baagh se main aayi re
Dekho pyaala mera chalka ke chal
Mere husn ke charche aam hue hain
Dikhla ke jhalak bas ek nazar
Mohe bichwa ke dunk jaisa lage jawani
Nighahen ladte hi dil ka machalna
Kushi ke phool liye aa gaye bahar ke din
Chhayi hariyali dekho jhoome dali dali
Ashiana lut gaya aur ho gaye barbaad
Raja jani laga mohe nainwa ka baan
Dekh meri ada hue lakhon fida
Are kaun desh se laya re
Lo main layi suiyaan chakoo kainchi
Hans le gaa le mauj udaa le
Le chal wahan piya jahan tera mera jiya
Uii allah raat suhani machle jawani
Jiya bechain mera din ka rain
Bedardi ne dard mera jana nehin
Kabhie hamare ghar bhi aao naqadnarayanji
Dil ka afsana kahega jal ke
Koi meri sune aurat na bane
Aye dil na sata mujchko sawan ke mahine men
Meri ankhiyan ho gayi char o dildaar
Jhukti hui nazar ka ada naam
Thandi hawa men jiya dole ho
Matwale nazar ho daalo na idhar
Jagmag deep jale aaye hai raat
Mile dildaar ko dildaar badi mushkil se
Yeh hawa yeh ghata the saman
Ae sama yeh zindagi aayi hi lekar khushi
Yeh jaan yeh imaan bas allah ke liye hai
Nadiya ri nadiya jake sajan se kehna
Badi mushkil se dil ki beqarari ko qarar aaya
Is dil ki lagi samjha na koi
Aaja mere raja mere preetam mere pyare
Kali kali ankhian dekho more saiyan
Papi duniya se door aao chale
Jaam thaam le sochte hi sochte
Ghadi ghadi bhar ae jiya beqarar ho
Aye dil tu kahin le chal
Roop ki rani aayi pyar ki daulat layi
Kajal wale ankhiyan mori to bin sajan
Na jane re saiyan man ki batiyaan
Ye duniya ke mele magar hum akele
Main bhie daku tu bhie daku
Tumhe kya hai bahane karo nisdin
Dhad dhum chuk lag rahi jungle men
Oi jung bhi hai pyar bhi hai
Yeh mard ke sar ke dard
Tamasha hai bas ye ghadi do ghadi ka
Jab teer chalta nainon ke dildaar
Saamne baith ke jab dil ko churai
Wo aa gaye do matwale do dilwalo
Main ki masti aur hai ankhon ki masti
Baanka wah sanam meri rok ke rahen
Ai ji janeman apna se yun nazrein
Chali pee ki nagar ab kahe ka dar
Dil na lagana dil ka lagana
Dekha jo balma ne meri taraf
Aata hai paisa jata hai paisa
Naacho ri guiyaan ri baaje sehnai
Mere raja kisi ka ho jaa pyar men
Main kya janu dil ka lagana
Babuji aao aao rani ji aao
Teer na talwar se duniya maane
Lagi mori man ki o sajna sara yaad
Nazar ki chot ko jo dil pe khaa nehin
Sambhalo sambhalo zara apne dil ko
Savere savere chodkar na jaa re
Gori jaeghi des parai to chitthi
Dil uda hai hai ye dil uda
Hai sambhal ke bhai bhai ji zara
Mhari chamni ko bal gayo tel
Ho haiya ho jaan gayi rama
Ankhiyon se ankhiyan mila ke chale
Ab to jee hone laga kisi ki soorat
Dil se dil ka paimana takra le
Chun chun ke layi hoon main phool
Ruk ja re piya mora dhadke jiya
Yeh ankhen jis se lad jayen
Mere husn ka sun ke fasana
Ye dunia jane na kaun hoon main
Mohabbat ka shola ye kaliyon se bola
Ae dil agar hai paas to huzoor
Akhu aaya hai hum to aaye hain tere
Laga kaun sa nasha jee nas nas men
